subject: Now Open: File to Be a Convention Delegate!
body:
It's 2020, and filing officially opened today to put your name on the May 2020 Republican primary ballot.This includesrunning for positions... |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ab95ce74e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Filing Now Open:
Run to Be a State Convention Delegate**
---
| It's 2020, and filing officially opened today to put your name on the May 2020 Republican primary ballot. **This includes running for positions within your Republican Party, including _running to be a precinct committeeman_ or a _delegate to represent your county at the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention_!**

If you're interested in running to be a delegate at this year's state convention, which runs June 19-20 in Indianapolis, [check out our new state convention website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c5859c2fa2&e=1acd9bb3d6), which will continue to be updated as we get closer to the big event.

Today, [this website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=edfed58a93&e=1acd9bb3d6) includes information about:
* Filing to run to be a delegate
* Volunteering at state convention
* The number of delegates from each county
* Hotel room block options
* Contact information for questions

We're looking forward to another exciting election year, and we'll need the help of our entire team (including you!) to make sure we can continue delivering results for Hoosiers.

Thanks,
-Your Indiana Republican Party

---
| [LEARN MORE: 2020 Indiana Republican Party State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb46b83014&e=1acd9bb3d6 "LEARN MORE: 2020 Indiana Republican Party State Convention")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Our soldiers are safe, and America is prepared
body:
President Donald J. Trump addressed the nation this morning in the wake of Iran’s air attack against bases where American troops were stationed... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=52ac0a7b61&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 8, 2020
---
| | |
# **Our soldiers are safe, and America is prepared**

**President Donald J. Trump** addressed the nation this morning in the wake of Iran’s air attack against bases where American troops were stationed in Iraq.

**“No****Americans were harmed** in last night’s attack by the Iranian regime. We suffered no casualties, all of our soldiers are safe, and only minimal damage was sustained at our military bases,” the President said from the White House’s Grand Foyer.

**President Trump:** [Iran will never have a nuclear weapon on my watch.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc35fb1ecc&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Iran appears to be** **standing down,** which is a good thing for all parties concerned and a very good thing for the world.”

**For four decades** , the world has tolerated Iran’s destructive and destabilizing behavior across the Middle East and beyond. Appeasement only emboldened a regime that is now the leading state sponsor of terrorism on Earth. After the foolish Iran nuclear deal was signed in 2013, the hostilities and violence only increased.

**Instead of thanking** the United States and President Obama for the $1.8 billion cash windfall under the nuclear deal, Iran went on a terror spree. It created hell in Yemen, Syria, Lebanon, Afghanistan, and Iraq. The regime brought violence even to its own backyard, recently killing 1,500 people at the protests taking place throughout Iran.

**As the leader** of the lethal Quds Force, Qasem Soleimani was personally responsible for many of the worst atrocities. He trained terrorist armies, including Hezbollah, to launch strikes against civilian targets. He fueled bloody civil wars across the Middle East. He viciously wounded and killed thousands of American troops, often with ghastly roadside bombs. His most recent American casualties came less than 2 weeks ago.

**Those days are over.** Soleimani is dead, and terrorists everywhere just received a powerful message: If you threaten innocent lives, you will suffer grave consequences.

**New measures** to counter Iran were announced today, as well. The United States will immediately impose more powerful economic sanctions on the regime in Tehran, which will remain in place until Iran changes its behavior. President Trump has also asked that NATO allies become much more involved in the Middle East process.

**America has new leverage** to pursue real, lasting peace in the region. “We are now the number-one producer of oil and natural gas anywhere in the world. We are independent, and we do not need Middle East oil,” President Trump said. He added that on his watch, America’s great military has been rebuilt to the tune of $2.5 trillion.

**When America is strong,** the world is safer. “The fact that we have this great military and equipment, however, does not mean we have to use it,” President Trump said. “We do not want to use it. American strength, both military and economic, is the best deterrent.”

**🎬** [The days of tolerating Iran’s destructive behavior are over.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29050e9c74&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [Read President Trump’s full statement ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=745daa348e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

I'm reaching out because **I need your help to build a campaign that can compete with Senator John Cornyn and WIN**. Will you give me a minute to explain why pitching in _right now_ is so important?

(If you're already with me, you can pitch in here: **[https://www.mjfortexas.com/FightBackFund](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907b0/7f51f7bc/4ad7e5cf/4ef0276f/1551890753/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.2nd__732__&amount=10&recurring=true")**) | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907b0/7f51f7bc/4ad7e5cf/4ef0276f/1551890753/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.2nd__732__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Senator Cornyn already aired the first TV ads of the campaign, thanks to the nearly $11 million war chest he amassed with lots of help from corporate PAC and special interest donors. He's not going to hold back. With ten months until the election, this race is already well underway -- and it's clear it's going to be a long and expensive one. That's why pitching in right now is so critical.

Here's the deal: I don't have any corporate PACs pouring money into my campaign, hoping I'll play nice with them once I'm Senator. I'm not taking their money because **I will be accountable to the people, not special interests.**
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907b0/7f51f7bc/4ad7e5cf/4ef0276f/1551890753/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.2nd__732__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Friend,

It’s no secret that Governor Holcomb loves Indiana. And we know you love Indiana, and everything that makes our state unique, too. We’re One Indiana.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fef43e98fe494e0d814748c3cca0437d&_e=fk_u_c2s-omVgwK2EkEpL5eT0us4_-T2qchTXhc9b6GdKNxhdhH2pwLtCpLkG9AYQ2zkTMnE1YHPW9qur9EIGIYyr7GqKmnX1AlaJw174g3d5YJlU2b8xIsUBKVA0wRjmhgjFHsitl61R3V5K1MTx6Mui0A5OiMGvxsW8JunzQgjCIBoJhEmv90rnLO0Sfo12xQR5yBNiJvfLQjoUdYb0gW9_hnzz3JSK-bvy1_LWQYbt5M5WYrpoIrTYFR_DqzG-Ll8LanXSDHWvP2Tc2oyuwBxQWGYFG0HPZcyiCvej6AMNWUp8PPGLIMos25L1VmF9hiqKMJvGtyLcEcNJUgkZffOxpWXWJvfY8J7dHyQuSZpHu9MSt7z2dxIY49BQ64fs042ec6MSfjsND8_MaS-_l9o81PUOTEBccaao2ffeJg%3D)
Eric’s been exploring our One Indiana for a long time now. Long before he became governor and even long before he began his public service. In fact, Eric’s enthusiasm for Indiana and exploring the state started when he was growing up in Pike Township, Indianapolis and continued when he moved back to Indiana after serving overseas as a member of the United States Navy.
And as governor, he stays in perpetual motion. Eric’s visited all 92 Indiana counties multiple times and, as you can imagine, throughout all his travels he’s learned a lot about our state, consumed more calories than he wants to admit, and met thousands of Hoosiers along the way.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fef43e98fe494e0d814748c3cca0437d&_e=fk_u_c2s-omVgwK2EkEpL5eT0us4_-T2qchTXhc9b6GdKNxhdhH2pwLtCpLkG9AYQ2zkTMnE1YHPW9qur9EIGIYyr7GqKmnX1AlaJw174g3d5YJlU2b8xIsUBKVA0wRjmhgjFHsitl61R3V5K1MTx6Mui0A5OiMGvxsW8JunzQgjCIBoJhEmv90rnLO0Sfo12xQR5yBNiJvfLQjoUdYb0l2liWa-Pm9fR7iqNWAOJ3MbH5yjaBJWOCJTLYStq2aD32tuozpcQty5HJ0yu3L7Cdzo-r2tBEuLKR_6VbjiEgwRrS3o0vbe-pcGldRXK6_yPTS3wI2ywS38KiYq3GB-dJZayUxkkj0EzKrtAryG66SjPJfDIpOl5TMIQt6oTLr-pu__Jo3pY2-BIzD6--VbYwmpYWH1naIZZidN4H7YG7c%3D)
This year, Eric wants to share with you a little of what he’s learned, experienced and tasted when he’s been on the road. He wants to share some of those unique qualities that make our **One Indiana** so special. And we want to hear from you where he should stop next when he’s meeting Hoosiers throughout the state. That’s why we’re kicking off **Holcomb’s One Indiana** , a fun, weekly list of some of Eric’s favorite things in and about our state.
So, without further ado, and to start the series off, we bring you Gov. Holcomb’s 10 favorite Hoosier cheeseburgers:

clean_body: It’s no secret that Governor Holcomb loves our state. And we know you love Indiana, and everything that makes our state unique, too. Eric’s been | | | ---|---|--- | | Friend, It’s no secret that Governor Holcomb loves Indiana. And we know you love Indiana, and everything that makes our state unique, too. We’re One Indiana. Eric’s been exploring our One Indiana for a long time now. Long before he became governor and even long before he began his public service. In fact, Eric’s enthusiasm for Indiana and exploring the state started when he was growing up in Pike Township, Indianapolis and continued when he moved back to Indiana after serving overseas as a member of the United States Navy. And as governor, he stays in perpetual motion. Eric’s visited all 92 Indiana counties multiple times and, as you can imagine, throughout all his travels he’s learned a lot about our state, consumed more calories than he wants to admit, and met thousands of Hoosiers along the way. This year, Eric wants to share with you a little of what he’s learned, experienced and tasted when he’s been on the road. He wants to share some of those unique qualities that make our One Indiana so special. And we want to hear from you where he should stop next when he’s meeting Hoosiers throughout the state. That’s why we’re kicking off Holcomb’s One Indiana , a fun, weekly list of some of Eric’s favorite things in and about our state. So, without further ado, and to start the series off, we bring you Gov. Holcomb’s 10 favorite Hoosier cheeseburgers: in Jonesville (Bartholomew County) in the heart of beautiful downtown Nashville (Brown County). in Zionsville (Boone County). Home of the Big Ugly! in Madison (Jefferson County). You can’t go to Hanover without going to Hinkles... multiple times. in Martinsville (Morgan County). in Seymour (Jackson County). in Anderson (Madison County). Their tenderloin is pretty great, too... in Indianapolis (Marion County). in Madison (Jefferson County). in West Lafayette (Wabash Township). A historic drive-in and a Purdue pregame tradition! ** in Indianapolis (Marion County). How many of these have you been to? And, if you know a spot that Gov. Holcomb didn’t cover, please let us know below! | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Tell Donald Trump to stop detaining Iranian-Americans at the border.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't ignore this.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/iranian-american-border/?utm_source=ema_2020-01-08&source=ema_2020-01-08&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=8017%2E868730%2EzQl6QZ) Friend, We can't let this happen in our America. In our America, we must demand an end to racist, xenophobic, hateful policies. Here's the deal: On Washington state's border with Canada, Americans are being detained for absolutely no reason -- except that they happen to be Iranian-Americans. This is beyond unacceptable. It's antithetical to our American values. It harkens back to one of the darkest moments in our past -- when Japanese-Americans were detained in Washington state during World War II, and their constitutional and civic rights were removed out of fear and hatred. We can _never_ let that happen again. **No one should be discriminated against because of where they come from, how they look, or what language they speak.** [**This practice needs to end, and it needs to end now: Join me in calling on President Trump to stand with ALL Americans and stop detaining Iranian-Americans at the border NOW.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/iranian-american-border/?utm_source=ema_2020-01-08&source=ema_2020-01-08&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8017%2E868730%2EzQl6QZ) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/iranian-american-border/?utm_source=ema_2020-01-08&source=ema_2020-01-08&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8017%2E868730%2EzQl6QZ)
---
Now is the time to stand up and make it clear that xenophobia and hate will not stand in Washington state.
We've learned time and again that we cannot trust the Trump administration. In response to _multiple firsthand accounts of CBP agents seizing Iranian-American's passports while they waited for up to 12 hours for re-entry into the United States_ , Customs and Border Protection tried to say these reports of targeted xenophobia weren't true. But the fact is, this detention policy is right in line with this administration's never-ending targeting of immigrants.
Here in Washington, we have a long history of standing up against these kinds of injustices: We fought back hard against the administration's hateful "Muslim ban" -- in fact I was the first governor in the country to do so -- and reinforced our status as a sanctuary state for immigrants of all nationalities. But simply put: We need to do more.
**I will do everything I can to fight for the rights of all Washingtonians, but I need to know you're with me:** [**Join me in calling on Donald Trump to end the CBP policy of detaining Iranian-Americans at the border right now -- add your name.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/iranian-american-border/?utm_source=ema_2020-01-08&source=ema_2020-01-08&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8017%2E868730%2EzQl6QZ)
Very truly yours,
Jay

clean_body: We can't ignore this. | Friend, We can't let this happen in our America. In our America, we must demand an end to racist, xenophobic, hateful policies. Here's the deal: On Washington state's border with Canada, Americans are being detained for absolutely no reason -- except that they happen to be Iranian-Americans. This is beyond unacceptable. It's antithetical to our American values. It harkens back to one of the darkest moments in our past -- when Japanese-Americans were detained in Washington state during World War II, and their constitutional and civic rights were removed out of fear and hatred. We can never let that happen again. No one should be discriminated against because of where they come from, how they look, or what language they speak. | Now is the time to stand up and make it clear that xenophobia and hate will not stand in Washington state. We've learned time and again that we cannot trust the Trump administration. In response to multiple firsthand accounts of CBP agents seizing Iranian-American's passports while they waited for up to 12 hours for re-entry into the United States , Customs and Border Protection tried to say these reports of targeted xenophobia weren't true. But the fact is, this detention policy is right in line with this administration's never-ending targeting of immigrants. Here in Washington, we have a long history of standing up against these kinds of injustices: We fought back hard against the administration's hateful "Muslim ban" -- in fact I was the first governor in the country to do so -- and reinforced our status as a sanctuary state for immigrants of all nationalities. But simply put: We need to do more. I will do everything I can to fight for the rights of all Washingtonians, but I need to know you're with me: Very truly yours, Jay

name: Voter.Protection@dga.net
subject: Is it a priority?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
This is urgent, Team -
Republicans are struggling to win votes from communities of color and young people. So instead of changing their policies to appeal to these voters, they're making it harder for them to vote. **They 're purging voter rolls, implementing voter ID laws and gerrymandering districts to give themselves an unfair advantage.**
Democrats, on the other hand, are expanding voting rights, automatically registering young voters, creating vote-by-mail programs and inspiring voters to make their voices heard at the ballot box.
With so much at stake this year, it's never been more critical to defend free and fair elections - and that starts with getting people to the polls. **But to do that, we need to show Democratic lawmakers that protecting voting rights is a priority. We need to know where 3,000 more grassroots Democrats stand before midnight, and we haven 't heard from you yet. Tell us now: **
| | **Do you think Democrats should defend the right to vote?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY4MDY5NjcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMDU0MDEyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm asking you to dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, We're in the final stretch now before the Iowa caucuses next month. While I may be racing back and forth between the critical early states, Washington DC, and my home in Newark, that doesn't mean we can't find time to have dinner together. **We 're putting together something special -- a team dinner with a few lucky supporters from around the country. We'll fly you out to meet me for a meal on the campaign trail!** **[So what do you say? All you need to do is chip in right now (whatever you can!) to be automatically entered for a chance to join me and a few others for a small group dinner.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20200108_CB_20200108-fr-CB-EM2-ANS_ANS_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Did you see the latest Star Wars movie? I'd love to talk with you about it over dinner (if you didn't see it, I'll keep the spoilers to a minimum). Interested in knowing what I'll do on my first day in the Oval Office? I'd be happy to tell you. Want to hear the world's greatest dad jokes? I'm ready to make you feign laughter. Prefer to talk about literally anything else instead? I'm game for that too. We'll take care of everything -- including your flights and hotel accommodations. All you have to do is show up ready for fun conversation and a great meal. **[I really do hope we'll be grabbing dinner together. Just chip in now and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to join me.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20200108_CB_20200108-fr-CB-EM2-ANS_ANS_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'd love to meet you. Excited for this,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20200108_CB_20200108-fr-CB-EM2-ANS_ANS_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by February 3, 2020. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28e8/2817610118/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-jan-dinnerwcab") or click [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f7/2817610118/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/dinner-with-cab") to enter without contributing. Four (4) winners will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to a destination in Sponsor's sole discretion; one-night hotel accommodations for winner; opportunity to have dinner with Senator Cory Booker (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules at [https://corybooker.com/dinner-with-cory-contest-2/](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f6/2817610118/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/dinner-with-cory-contest-2/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f5/2817610118/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f4/2817610118/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f3/2817610118/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f2/2817610118/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f1/2817610118/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ff0/5fca0d19/7b4feb86/291d28f5/2817610118/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Hope we see you there!

Team Hunt

body:
Bringing the "A" game tonight | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cf0e0e1a70c9/i-dont-mean-to-brag-but?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | **This may have been the best event yet!**

Tonight I participated in a candidate's forum in The Lakehouse in Del Webb in Richmond that was sponsored by the Sweetgrass Republican Club.

I have to tell you, **as we get closer to election day, the fire in my belly gets hotter and hotter as my message gets stronger and stronger.**

Last night folks in Richmond expressed their concerns and feelings about the issues that matter to them. Tonight at the candidate's forum, I got talk passionately about the things that animate me everyday on the campaign trail.

**You won't be surprised to learn that a lot of them are the same things.**
---
|
---
|
---
| [I stand with Kathaleeen!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=84f23ee418&e=01c99b7fbd "I stand with Kathaleeen!")
---
| A lot of you will agree when I said...

_I will**stand with President Trump** to pass his entire agenda like building our border wall. This will help with issues like immigration, security, healthcare, education, illegal drugs, and human trafficking._

But I bet a lot of you don't know about what was said next...

_I’m committed to giving my** _Congressional salary of about $174,000_** _a**year**_ to the DOD to put toward building the border wall._
---
|
---
| That's right, if elected I will not do it at the taxpayer's expense instead will give my entire salary to help keep Texas and America safe. That is my commitment to you and to our country.

I will also file a bill to prevent any member of congress from receiving a salary if they don't pass a budget.

[If that sounds good to you, please consider supporting this campaign to stand with President Trump and his agenda by retaking the House of Representatives from Nancy Pelosi and her leftist crazies!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=8fdab4a899&e=01c99b7fbd)

---
| [Kathaleen for the win!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=bf28a3b711&e=01c99b7fbd "Kathaleen for the win!")
---
| If you haven't made it out to our events, there are still two months until the primary day. **It is you...you energy, your passion, and your love for this country...that lifts up this campaign and makes me work even harder.**

Let's do this together and let's make America even greater!

Kathaleen
---
| | | | | [](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=9adcc37b65&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=05b042ac78&e=01c99b7fbd)

You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=e6ae48b5f0).

name: Tina Smith
subject: My first time asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm asking you to make your first contribution of 2020 to my re-election campaign as we kick off this all-important election year.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Listen, folks -- we have two choices:

We can do everything we possibly can to protect this seat and make sure Democrats have what it takes to flip the Senate in November OR we can sit on our hands, lose momentum in this race, and risk Minnesota turning red.

**Personally, I would hate to see that second thing happen. If you would too, make your first contribution of 2020 to my re-election campaign as we kick off this all-important election year.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
My opponent, Republican Jason Lewis, is pulling out all the stops to defeat me and give Donald Trump another rubber stamp in Washington. In fact, Trump himself has already pledged to come back to Minnesota to shore up his right-wing base.

You see, Trump is intent on winning our state after losing it by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016. His campaign is doing everything they can, including spending up to $30 million, to prevent Minnesota from slipping through his fingers again.

I don't have a massive war chest funded by GOP mega-donors or right-wing special interests like Donald Trump or Mitch McConnell. And trust me, I don't want one. Because I intend to win our race the right way, with support from folks like you, which is why I'm asking:

**Will you add your first contribution of 2020 to our re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota today? To win this race, keep our state blue, and make sure Democrats can flip the Senate this year, I'm counting on you to chip in any amount you can afford right now.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200108-first?refcode=em200108-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
The support you show our campaign today will send a powerful message to Trump and his cronies that no matter how much special-interest cash they have, Minnesota's Senate seat cannot be bought.

Thanks for taking action.

-- Tina

body:

[Michael needs to raise $255,321 in the next week in order to launch an aggressive paid media and organizing program in New Hampshire to reach the 67% of undecided Democratic voters before the primary. Will you chip in right now to help?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba818/134673f2/8d003ea/699765e5/2733692553/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
Team: [ If we don't hit our goal, our campaign will be forced to make some hard choices.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba818/134673f2/8d003ea/699765fb/2733692553/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Missing our deadline means stretching our limited resources even further, cutting back on materials for our field organizers, and limiting how many voters our paid media program can reach.

[These are decisions we don't even want to think about right now, so we're pouring all our energy into raising the $255,321 we need over the next week.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba818/134673f2/8d003ea/699765fb/2733692553/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

If we don't hit this goal, we won't be able to keep our ads on air, knock doors, or reach the 67% of New Hampshire Democratic voters who remain undecided.

[Will you rush a donation right now to help us raise $700,000 to invest in New Hampshire? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba818/134673f2/8d003ea/699765fb/2733692553/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Here's what we CAN do when we reach this goal:

We can launch our paid media program to get Michael's message out to the two-thirds of Democrats who are undecided.

We can hire more field organizers to blanket New Hampshire and talk to voters face-to-face.

[And when voters start to make up their minds, we can WIN.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba818/134673f2/8d003ea/699765fb/2733692553/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_010820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Was Trump Right to Take Out Soleimani?
body:
Democrats and media critical of TRUMP, again! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Was Trump Right to Take Out Soleimani?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-j/)
Virtually all the talking heads in the media, as well as congressional Democrats, have been critical of the President's decision to take out Iranian general Qassem Soleimani. However, I think it's important to look closely at the facts and not jump to conclusions. In this week's blog, I evaluate this ongoing situation unfolding in the Middle East. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [My Predictions for 2020](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-d/)
It's that time of year again. In this week's blog I'll make my best attempt to predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year! Reds, Bengals, and Politics? You won't want to miss today's post! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Merry Christmas!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-u/)
In this week's blog I keep politics brief with a short update and share a Christmas greeting. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Impeachment - Here We Go](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhohtid-kujkulhluu-n/)
Today's the day. Democrats in the House are actually going to go through with it. They are going to impeach President Trump - on the flimsiest of grounds! In this week's blog, I give you my thoughts on how this all plays out. subject: Breaking News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13733560/143050455/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdkNjk1OC0wNTMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8HaZbJBrtduyf1j16AtPmBpYGSoNoccJbFf71bQ42lA=&emci=028df22d-6432-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=d97d6958-0533-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=2478574)

| | As your Congressman, I deal with significant national issues on a daily basis, but I also have a firm understanding that my job begins and ends each and every day in the communities of the Third Congressional District. And that is why I am extremely proud to share the news that I have received endorsements from nearly every mayor across our district as we hit the ground running for my re-election campaign for the Democratic Primary on March 17. From Lockport to La Grange, Oak Lawn to Romeoville, I am honored to have the continued support of so many elected officials in my district who work so hard every day to make their communities great places to live. Check out the full list of endorsements and comments from mayors [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13733561/143050456/157229846?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdkNjk1OC0wNTMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8HaZbJBrtduyf1j16AtPmBpYGSoNoccJbFf71bQ42lA=&emci=028df22d-6432-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=d97d6958-0533-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=2478574). Being a commonsense problem solver who is willing to work across both sides of the aisle has enabled me to help spur job creation, improve local transportation and support middle class families. But it has also drawn the ire of the far left and I am now facing a fierce challenge from an opponent with a radical progressive agenda, endorsed by socialist congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) among others. As we gear up for battle, I am asking for your support for my re-election to help keep commonsense values and leadership alive and well in our communities. With so much at stake in 2020 for IL03 and our nation, your support is needed now more than ever. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13733562/143050457/1995737218?source=GS_DL_Keywords_1090808&ms=Name-ID_Lipinski_V1&refcode=GS_DL_Keywords_1090808&refcode2=Name-ID_Lipinski_V1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdkNjk1OC0wNTMzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8HaZbJBrtduyf1j16AtPmBpYGSoNoccJbFf71bQ42lA=&emci=028df22d-6432-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=d97d6958-0533-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=2478574) Thank you for your support, Dan

clean_body: | | | As your Congressman, I deal with significant national issues on a daily basis, but I also have a firm understanding that my job begins and ends each and every day in the communities of the Third Congressional District. And that is why I am extremely proud to share the news that I have received endorsements from nearly every mayor across our district as we hit the ground running for my re-election campaign for the Democratic Primary on March 17. From Lockport to La Grange, Oak Lawn to Romeoville, I am honored to have the continued support of so many elected officials in my district who work so hard every day to make their communities great places to live. Check out the full list of endorsements and comments from mayors . Being a commonsense problem solver who is willing to work across both sides of the aisle has enabled me to help spur job creation, improve local transportation and support middle class families. But it has also drawn the ire of the far left and I am now facing a fierce challenge from an opponent with a radical progressive agenda, endorsed by socialist congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) among others. As we gear up for battle, I am asking for your support for my re-election to help keep commonsense values and leadership alive and well in our communities. With so much at stake in 2020 for IL03 and our nation, your support is needed now more than ever. Thank you for your support, Dan | PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS Dan Lipinski for Congress P.O. Box 520 Western Springs, IL 60558 United States

name: Mary Mancini
subject: all the data
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
I’m really excited to announce that a generous donor has agreed to match funds up to $6,000 this month to go towards our DIGTHUBRI2020 (Data Is Going To Help Us Beat Republicans In 2020) program!
DIGTHUBRI2020, or DIG2020 for short, is how we acquire, organize, and distribute all of the relevant data that Democrats use in their campaigns. With so many people moving each day to cities like Nashville and Memphis, it’s critical that we keep our data up to date. This includes things like current addresses, and voter history - and since Tennessee doesn’t affiliate voters with a party during registration, knowing who voted Democrat in past races and primaries is paramount to our efforts. That’s how we keep track of volunteers, supporters, and most importantly the voters!
Information is power, and in this case that power comes with a price tag of $12,000. Even though that might sound like a lot, it's actually covering 12 separate data acquisitions over the course of an entire year - but we have to pay upfront. That’s why it’s so important that we raise the $6k this month and take advantage of the generosity shown by our matching donor. Can you chip in right now, and help us?

clean_body: [] Peter, I’m really excited to announce that a generous donor has agreed to match funds up to $6,000 this month to go towards our DIGTHUBRI2020 (Data Is Going To Help Us Beat Republicans In 2020) program! DIGTHUBRI2020, or DIG2020 for short, is how we acquire, organize, and distribute all of the relevant data that Democrats use in their campaigns. With so many people moving each day to cities like Nashville and Memphis, it’s critical that we keep our data up to date. This includes things like current addresses, and voter history - and since Tennessee doesn’t affiliate voters with a party during registration, knowing who voted Democrat in past races and primaries is paramount to our efforts. That’s how we keep track of volunteers, supporters, and most importantly the voters! Information is power, and in this case that power comes with a price tag of $12,000. Even though that might sound like a lot, it's actually covering 12 separate data acquisitions over the course of an entire year - but we have to pay upfront. That’s why it’s so important that we raise the $6k this month and take advantage of the generosity shown by our matching donor. Can you chip in right now, and help us? [] [] [] [] Thank you, [] -- Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States

| As of this week, Tom Steyer and Michael Bloomberg have spent more than $200 million on TV and radio advertising alone. It's _**more than 5x**_ what the rest of the Democratic field is spending on these same mediums... combined. **Will you chip in to help us power this grassroots campaign? name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Last month we set an ambitious end-of-year goal, but we never lost faith in our grassroots team -- we knew you would step up. And you did.
|
---

| | Friends, Last month we set an ambitious end-of-year goal, but we never lost faith in our grassroots team -- we knew you would step up. **And you did.** We hit our goal, setting ourselves up for success in 2020 -- all thanks to you. Our community proved it is fed-up with Chris Smith after 40 years in Congress marked by failure, inaction, and self-promotion. We deserve better. Our powerful grassroots movement can change the landscape. I will go to Washington and fight for what matters: campaign finance reform, affordable healthcare, and a strong local economy. Thank you, again, for your support -- I will see you out on the campaign trail. -Stephanie | **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e1/522d4087/7aff6249/4f34102e/3785399594/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=20200109_thankyou_em_ty_btn")**
---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The last thing the GOP wants you to do is vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In the midst of the impeachment hearings, Nancy Pelosi showed the country what real leadership looks like: She, along with Reps. John Lewis and Terri Sewell, passed a landmark voting rights bill, the Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA), which would restore voting rights and election protections gutted by the conservatives on the Supreme Court. BUT Mitch McConnell's waiting to kill the bill in the Senate so he can guarantee Trump's re-election. Trump doesn't want more people to vote. He knows that when people vote, the GOP loses. They'd rather keep as few people voting as possible so they can hold on to power and let their rich donors dictate policy instead of the people. At When Democrats, we're doing all we can to inform voters about the GOP's nefarious actions and get them to the polls to defeat the GOP. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House in 2020, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and we HAVE to stop the GOP from cheating, purging voter rolls, and discouraging voters. We need 10,000 engaged Democrats to demand the Senate pass the VRAA and ensure every eligible voter can vote in 2020 \-- if you believe we need to stand up to the GOP and protect the right to vote: That's why we need to know: [**Demand the Senate protect the right to vote from Trump 's attacks!>>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf2f/6e9863e8/17b714aa/1db0476d/3306686576/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/d9i19Owi") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf2f/6e9863e8/17b714aa/1db04773/3306686576/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200109a.ND&refcode2=X88TrvlTL0tf8moyvbFd")
---

Coming from a politically diverse state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election. I knew running for president would be no different. But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight.

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about our kids' future than their next tweet.

That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep fighting and make sure everyone sees our TV ad so they hear our message about the future we can build together.

name: NRSC Memberships
subject: NEW 2020 NRSC Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Impeachment Without End
body:
"Will Nancy Pelosi ever send the two House articles of impeachment to the Senate?" | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=497a0047be&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Impeachment Without End**

“Will Nancy Pelosi ever send the two House articles of impeachment to the Senate? We’re going on three weeks since the House voted, and Congress is back in session, but the House Speaker said Tuesday she wants to see what kind of trial the Senate will hold before she deigns to appoint House managers to make their case,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

“This is a parody of impeachment. House Democrats said they had to rush to vote before Christmas because President Trump poses a clear and present danger, but now the urgency is gone.” It also runs afoul of the Constitution, which gives the House the “sole power of impeachment” and the Senate the “sole power to try all impeachments.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=859af31d22&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump got it exactly right Wednesday morning: ‘Iran appears to be standing down, which is a good thing for all parties concerned and a very good thing for the world.’ . . . Iran, as the president noted Wednesday, has been provoking the United States — and getting away with it — for 40 years. ‘Those days are over,’ Trump declared. About time,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a75d8b374c&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Senate Democrats are breaking with their party leaders over House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s decision to hold on to the articles of impeachment, saying it is time to get President Trump’s trial rolling . . . Senate Republicans have remained united behind Mr. McConnell’s demand for a trial process that would mirror the 1999 impeachment trial of President Bill Clinton,” Alex Swoyer and Gabriella Muñoz report in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7eb7f50f1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Private payroll growth ended 2019 on a strong note, with companies adding 202,000 positions in December in another sign of a healthy labor market, according to a report Wednesday from ADP and Moody’s Analytics. The total was well above the 150,000 consensus estimate from economists surveyed,” Jeff Cox reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf09043a35&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.cnbc.com/2020/01/08/adp-moodys-private-payrolls-december-2019.html").
---
|
---
| “My 5-year-old daughter has cystic fibrosis and may eventually need a lung transplant. Just before Christmas, the Trump administration gave an early gift to the roughly 113,000 Americans currently awaiting transplanted organs. It proposed two new rules that will make transplants easier,” Mary Vought writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d07f357f51&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c121f0f29&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=098266840b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=87b58e64c4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Susan Collins decided to vote to advance the impeachment trial without hearing from witnesses because she was mad at Democrats for supporting Sara Gideon's campaign.
body:

Friends - did you really expect anything more than this?

**That 's not what leadership looks like. Now, if you're ready to send a real leader to the U.S. Senate:**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: How to Improve Education for ALL Students in America
body:
Dear Peter,

Education is a critical issue for me. As someone who was educated in public schools, I know what a good education can do for a kid. At the same time, I've seen our education fail so many students, setting them up for a challenging life.

The vast differences in outcomes between black and brown students and their white counterparts in our country are unacceptable. Students of color face large obstacles to achieving their dreams.

We must fight to make sure all students have the opportunity to achieve an outstanding education. As Congressman, I will fight for initiatives to recruit, train and pay outstanding teachers and school leaders. In addition we will increase funding for vocational programs, extracurriculars and Title I schools.

Providing quality education to all of America's kids, especially those in Houston, is so important to me, that I've hired former teachers and professors onto my campaign team. We need a Congressional representative who is well-informed about educational best practices. Our teachers deserve. Our kids deserve it. Let's make it happen.

Click the link below. We need your help in helping our campaign win on election day.

We can do better,

Marc

clean_body: Dear Peter, Education is a critical issue for me. As someone who was educated in public schools, I know what a good education can do for a kid. At the same time, I've seen our education fail so many students, setting them up for a challenging life. The vast differences in outcomes between black and brown students and their white counterparts in our country are unacceptable. Students of color face large obstacles to achieving their dreams. We must fight to make sure all students have the opportunity to achieve an outstanding education. As Congressman, I will fight for initiatives to recruit, train and pay outstanding teachers and school leaders. In addition we will increase funding for vocational programs, extracurriculars and Title I schools. Providing quality education to all of America's kids, especially those in Houston, is so important to me, that I've hired former teachers and professors onto my campaign team. We need a Congressional representative who is well-informed about educational best practices. Our teachers deserve. Our kids deserve it. Let's make it happen. Click the link below. We need your help in helping our campaign win on election day. We can do better, Marc Donate Now () ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () Copyright © 2020 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved. body:

Lisa is out meeting with voters, listening to their concerns and ideas, and spreading her winning message. There is a lot of energy on the ground, and we’re building strong momentum to win big in 2020. But we can’t take anything for granted or leave anything to chance. In fact, we need to work harder. Peter, that's why I'm emailing you today. name: John Hickenlooper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, In just a moment, I am going to ask you to rush a critical donation to our campaign before next week's mid-month fundraising deadline. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important. I probably don't need to tell you how important this Colorado Senate race is if Democrats want to take back the Senate. In fact, our race is one of the most likely Senate seats to flip in 2020 right now. But it's going to take a whole lot of grassroots donations to overcome the fundraising advantage that's been gifted to our opponent by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's rolodex of far-right billionaire megadonors. **And the truth is, our fundraising this month has gotten off to a rough start -- bringing in about 32% fewer individual donations than at this point last month.** Now, it's not an emergency. I'm not looking to freak anybody out. I'm just telling you the truth because we need to get caught back up in the next few days. So we're setting a goal to raise $100,000 in the next week from grassroots Democrats like you. That's why I'm personally asking... **Can I count on you to make a donation of $10 or more to our campaign today? Your support will immediately go toward winning this race and give us a chance to finally get things done for everyday people:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200109-lme?refcode=em-200109-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Gov. Eric Holcomb
subject: Will you join me in celebrating Hoosier law enforcement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Today, we honor the men and women who put their lives on the line every single day to keep us safe. National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day is... | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d316d9abc75f4cb28c1af8e7a3495742&_e=SO2y2ZsuC_GpdADbnS2AOBpjnlZ2FJnx3MYxlNy9ZhOiKCEqRqeZHlT0Y3proSwqn_tE-IrB4RJJVHQA4h890EGDz357cqGVMRvCgy5lSFGQePcnvQiQW91yC7byGJcAEvIgjbeT45-svOKTywVkFpAarYLSue4PQyq3VxFx_EoYm48pPGbh_dFmmwf7yfWaiUd8UUD7ysIHjQaOdwh0PTiC-VvcQdwqupYpXS0Hd9oB5tmwhvs0d-ST8d7d3ozUkhBVd3zDbRHRe_O5gTV1pr2rfe5F_QTnB1PkToL-Y-RetoWrjqz-Jp1LpLBhuRzNGvqN7X8wF1rKkFK4H2WflphOllC8qQgL-py8i89epT6qdgv22rRYnykEJ5hmmiOP99rM8R3B6vKg-bnApZg_FA%3D%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

Today, we honor the men and women who put their lives on the line every single day to keep us safe.

National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day is about respecting and recognizing the contributions and the sacrifice of the policemen and women who stand on a thin blue line to serve and protect.

From giving a well-earned and deserved pay increase to our Indiana State Police troopers to providing public safety organizations with the resources they need to do their jobs, our administration has made supporting our police and the work that they do a top priority. That’s why the Indiana State Police Alliance — comprised of 2,000 active and retired state troopers from across all 92 of Indiana’s counties — endorsed our 2020 campaign.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d316d9abc75f4cb28c1af8e7a3495742&_e=SO2y2ZsuC_GpdADbnS2AOBpjnlZ2FJnx3MYxlNy9ZhOiKCEqRqeZHlT0Y3proSwqn_tE-IrB4RJJVHQA4h890EGDz357cqGVMRvCgy5lSFGQePcnvQiQW91yC7byGJcAEvIgjbeT45-svOKTywVkFpAarYLSue4PQyq3VxFx_EoYm48pPGbh_dFmmwf7yfWaRyBWw268Q5zrfls-Lq6j1_BwHDLl6dM7FGbdZixJ-skenhoGpASrxzmKaS8dVc2Pq_3xxZh6VC8IGSupDPxIXKNBS7V2-N6QAhB5fm9ircglBbfmTKyLCk0im5NIysxPGNo36Wa15WqEqE1szjsYIOypR9AoPyhZkkxVkURkA_zLEGTue3gsIP31hD3LZcmmQKRcpmzlX2uqDmwix52kmQ%3D%3D)
Getting our law enforcement the resources and support they need is a crucial part of making Indiana a great place to do business, raise a family, and enjoy life. I couldn’t appreciate the work that they do more — **[that’s why I’d like to ask you to join me in thanking and supporting Indiana’s police on this special day.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d316d9abc75f4cb28c1af8e7a3495742&_e=SO2y2ZsuC_GpdADbnS2AOBpjnlZ2FJnx3MYxlNy9ZhOiKCEqRqeZHlT0Y3proSwqn_tE-IrB4RJJVHQA4h890EGDz357cqGVMRvCgy5lSFGQePcnvQiQW91yC7byGJcAEvIgjbeT45-svOKTywVkFpAarYLSue4PQyq3VxFx_EoYm48pPGbh_dFmmwf7yfWaljrxYqQvDGd_Q_SViLhsOThVqI4olDuwQMT9dfgpOS6kx4fibYnCR_cRFfsPrC-he1lPxql2tIr7-zMVOEK3_kwnQmMUjBf2mgPlmL6h2QPDNBepCpiLAmcDIvO7CZXn8VFaFvSOoC7VyO0p-QX08BPfFw2Mph0pWN5rfcnWFkdWD99kigm9CPJh9qCDuCFjZjxgfjcf7NddIueScKODSQ%3D%3D) **

Add your name at this safe and secure link to show your appreciation for law enforcement: **[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/leo-68223/](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d316d9abc75f4cb28c1af8e7a3495742&_e=SO2y2ZsuC_GpdADbnS2AOBpjnlZ2FJnx3MYxlNy9ZhOiKCEqRqeZHlT0Y3proSwqn_tE-IrB4RJJVHQA4h890EGDz357cqGVMRvCgy5lSFGQePcnvQiQW91yC7byGJcAEvIgjbeT45-svOKTywVkFpAarYLSue4PQyq3VxFx_EoYm48pPGbh_dFmmwf7yfWaBGHGxgEU9hRyWsslZ0E4BlTTy7xapZhhFBd-QmB96tL1NYUMNAerRaz9eAle8-8EGLPSlWOJRp0q51IIlSiDpz0vNjY00sfn0v4UdHN9T4zR5vBfTgdocXrbr-Exo6z5r7Jx8Y5M1wWap5QPglF6QmZeEVnseqED3kVRfbePqoznBzSfCQJsYt72whnoZrHe6t5vbktGM9JcP8CSPxDDcg%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

Governor Eric Holcomb

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: This is not the news we wanted to share.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
The Boston Globe just reported that Joe Kennedy outraised us.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df88/693b8b0a/4377ccbd/72de7520/3422047885/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
This is not the news we wanted to share. The Boston Globe reported this week that Joe Kennedy outraised us.
When our grassroots team outraised him in the third quarter, we knew he'd put up a tougher fight.
Look, this past quarter was our best ever, but it's clear we have more work to do to make sure we have what we need to compete.
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help us re-elect Ed. If we 're going to pass the most progressive agenda possible, then we need to keep Ed in the fight. **](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df88/693b8b0a/4377ccbd/72de7527/3422047885/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200109-full")
The truth is, Ed does not come from money. He grew up as the son of a milkman and worked his way through college driving an ice cream truck.
Ed has built his career by organizing and supporting grassroots movements capable of doing the hard work on the ground.
That's what we're going to do now, too. We are building a diverse, intergenerational movement of working people who are committed to fighting for our shared progressive values -- like the Green New Deal.
So Ed's counting on you, and he needs you behind him today.
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign right now to help us continue building our movement.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df88/693b8b0a/4377ccbd/72de7527/3422047885/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200109-full")
Together, we are going to win.
Let's get it done,
Team Markey

clean_body: The Boston Globe just reported that Joe Kennedy outraised us. "" Friends - This is not the news we wanted to share. The Boston Globe reported this week that Joe Kennedy outraised us. When our grassroots team outraised him in the third quarter, we knew he'd put up a tougher fight. Look, this past quarter was our best ever, but it's clear we have more work to do to make sure we have what we need to compete. "" The truth is, Ed does not come from money. He grew up as the son of a milkman and worked his way through college driving an ice cream truck. Ed has built his career by organizing and supporting grassroots movements capable of doing the hard work on the ground. That's what we're going to do now, too. We are building a diverse, intergenerational movement of working people who are committed to fighting for our shared progressive values -- like the Green New Deal. So Ed's counting on you, and he needs you behind him today. "" Together, we are going to win. Let's get it done, Team Markey "" * Paid for by The Markey Committee

body:
A little while ago, I heard about a man in New Hampshire who'd just lost his job but still donated $2 to our campaign. I don't take that lightly and I don't want anyone to make a donation... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bad7/45c30650/1eed7cf6e/66fc80b0/132364989/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
A little while ago, I heard about a man in New Hampshire who'd just lost his job but still donated $2 to our campaign.

I don't take that lightly and I don't want anyone to make a donation that doesn't fit in their budget. So I want you to know that every single contribution means a great deal to me and, more importantly, to our movement. I owe something to you and every grassroots donor: a promise that I'll fight just as hard as you do.

That man knew that his $2 donation would matter, and it does. He knew that his contribution would help level the playing field for families across the country, and it will.

He knew that he was joining the fight alongside millions of people he'd never meet, because we pick up each other's fights as our own.

I'm grateful down to my toes that he's in this fight -- and that you're in this fight, too. It means the world to me, and every single donation brings us closer to big, structural change.

**When I'm president, we'll have a government that listens to -- and works for -- people who reach deep into their pockets to chip in $2 at a time, not just those who can donate $2,000 without blinking an eye.**

**[We're going to do this -- together. If it makes sense for you to make a contribution right now, will you help keep up the fight by chipping in $2 right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bad7/45c30650/1eed7cf6e/66fc80b3/132364989/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjMzRl9FR1JfU1JZX0VfMjAyMDAxMDlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN33F_EGR_SRY_E_20200109_V1S1_P")**

>
The way I see it, getting involved in a political campaign is an act of optimism.

Joining the fight means that we can make things better than they are now. That we all have a role to play, whether it's chipping in a few bucks or knocking on doors for a few hours (or both!).

It's about hope -- hope for the America that we can build together, $2 at a time.

An America where Washington is focused like a laser on creating good-paying jobs for hard-working Americans, not padding the profits of giant multinational corporations.

Where people get the care they need if they get sick, and no one goes broke because of medical bills.

Where people can decide to have more kids without worrying that the cost of child care will crush them.

Where anyone who wants to follow their dream and hit the books can get a degree from a technical school, community college, or public university at no cost.

**2020 is our moment to dream big, fight hard, and win. Starting in 2021, we'll have a government that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.**

**[If that's the future you want to build, make a contribution today, and let's keep fighting side by side to make the big, structural change we need.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bad7/45c30650/1eed7cf6e/66fc80b3/132364989/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjMzRl9FR1JfU1JZX0VfMjAyMDAxMDlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN33F_EGR_SRY_E_20200109_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Franken Policy Team
subject: Mike wants to hear from you on foreign policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
The Admiral has discussed and commented on the airstrike that killed Iranian General Suleimani in Iraq last week. His private conversations with us about relations between the US and Middle Eastern na
|
---
| |
---

| | Hi team: The Admiral has discussed and commented on the airstrike that killed Iranian General Soleimani in Iraq last week. His private conversations with us about relations between the US and Middle Eastern nations are quite fascinating. Here's a quick summation:
* The Trump administration acts without an identifiable strategy
* Utterances from the White House, often well-removed from reality or legality, add to the confused state of our foreign relations
* Dubious decision-making, from stepping away from a host of international agreements (Paris Accord, JCPOA, a host of trade agreements, NAFTA, and more) with no replacement serves to advantage other nations, like Russia, over the US
* Coincidently to this, the GOP has not offered a whiff of responsibility to reign in the Executive.

Mike's decades of foreign policy experience, from his time in strategy and policy postings and as a flag officer in the Navy, makes him the ideal Senator to lasso the dangerous and reckless tendencies of the White House. But he wants to hear from you, can you answer a few questions on U.S. foreign policy? [**Click here to take our survey.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ca/33365068/4a6f6038/3f8b9bcf/2960893606/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/foreign-policy-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+take+our+survey&utm_campaign=FRA_20200108_fpsurvey_em_su_all&source=FRA_20200108_fpsurvey_em_su_all") | [Take the Survey >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ca/33365068/4a6f6038/3f8b9bc8/2960893606/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/foreign-policy-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=2+-+Take+the+Survey+gtgt&utm_campaign=FRA_20200108_fpsurvey_em_su_all&source=FRA_20200108_fpsurvey_em_su_all")
---

Thank you,
Franken Policy Team

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Demand money and billionaires get out of politics!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The 2010 _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision opened the floodgates to nearly unlimited political spending in elections. Donations now flood in from corporations, billionaires, and lobbyists, silencing the voices of everyday people in favor of appeasing the rich. We saw this with the 2017 Trump tax cuts, and we'll certainly see it again if he wins re-election. Democrats have proposed a constitutional amendment would allow Congress to eliminate the loopholes that allow companies to pour millions of dollars into campaigns and sway elections. But Mitch McConnell is standing in its way. He's intent on preserving the tight grip dark money and corporate donors have on politics, but we're going to stop him. With this new Democratic push, we're asking engaged Democrats to join us: [**Demand Congress overturn _Citizens United_!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd0/6e9863e8/17b10d6d/1db0474e/775953917/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-WDTO") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd0/6e9863e8/17b10d6d/1db0474e/775953917/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-WDTO")

subject: This is unbelievable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43ae/4bd7760e/46338caa/77acc183/3794291648/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/epaact?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1") The Trump Administration is creating major changes to the 50-year-old _National Environmental Policy Act._

**What this means:** Major federal projects like bridges, highways, pipelines, and power plants that will significantly impact the environment will no longer require a review or an environmental impact statement.

**What we 're doing about it: ** **[We are gathering 15,000 signatures in the next 24 hours to demand that the _National Environmental Policy Act_ DOES NOT change. Sign our petition today >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43ae/4bd7760e/46338caa/77acc182/3794291648/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/epaact?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+We+are+gathering+15000+signatures+in+the&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1")** | | [SIGN ON ->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43ae/4bd7760e/46338caa/77acc181/3794291648/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/epaact?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-++if+consfirstname++consfirstname++upper+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1")
---
Listen, our environment keeps taking hit after hit. If these major changes to the _National Environmental Policy Act_ occur, then the climate crisis could get worse.

**Under these changes, agencies will no longer have to examine if a mine, fossil fuel project, or pipeline would worsen our climate crisis.**

The _National Environmental Policy Act_ is a critical piece of legislation that must not be changed. **The health of our planet is too important.**

**If you want to become 1 of 15,000 demanding that the** _** National Environmental Policy Ac**_** _t_ MUST NOT be changed, then click the link below to sign our petition now: **
**(every signature matters)****[https://secure.314action.org/envact](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43ae/4bd7760e/46338caa/77acc180/3794291648/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/epaact?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+httpssecure314actionorgenvact&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1")**

Thank you for standing up for our environment,

314 Action

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43ae/4bd7760e/46338caa/77acc18f/3794291648/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NjMzOGNhYSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0M2FlIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/46338caa/29bb43ae?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb43ae/4bd7760e/46338caa/77acc18e/3794291648/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200109_2_1")** to make a donation.

| Patriot,
Last week, President Trump took swift action and eliminated one of the most dangerous men in the world, Qasem Soleimani. This global terrorist was responsible for hundreds of American deaths and was planning more attacks against our troops and diplomats. | We'll get right to the point - Michael needs your support right now.

We've already made so much progress toward our $700,000 goal, and we can't afford to take our foot off the gas now!

[It's going to take another $251,358 to be able to compete in New Hampshire:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba80f/134673f2/8d70f1c/699767e9/1989711793/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

* We are being outspent by billionaires flooding the airwaves.
* We have put together a robust plan to combat their messaging.
* We won't be able to keep our ads on the air if we miss this fundraising goal.

There's no denying that this is the most important election of our lifetime - and we can't risk losing.

But if we're going to win, we need to keep our ads on the air so voters hear our message about why Michael is the best candidate to beat Trump and lead us forward. It's that simple.
