name: Lisa Scheller
subject: will you take the pledge, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
Ever since I first began this race, I’ve been travelling all around our district talking to conservative patriots like you. The one thing they all hav Peter, Ever since I first began this race, I’ve been travelling all around our district talking to conservative patriots like you. The one thing they all have in common? A passion – a readiness – a fire in their hearts – to come out strong in 2020 and send a message at the ballot box that PA07 is ready for a new fighter in congress.
Well, Peter, this is the year. 2020 is officially upon us, and it’s time to set our plan towards victory into motion.
**But as excited as we are, I can assure you that Susan Wild and the left are even more fired up. **
They’re going to put on a full-court press, spend big, and do ANYTHING they can to hold on to their House majority and send President Trump packing.
That’s why we need to be fully committed to our cause. That’s where you come in.
**[I’m putting together a CONSERVATIVE VALUES PLEDGE – a firm commitment to stand strong behind our values of life and liberty, ahead of the 2020 election. Will you take the pledge?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=49b8fc31bd7d4cf29fc412de8214c26e&_e=nSxm057EyPNyqjDibKjb5CC52KKzzA4OVpjngyNygxherXxwob3vXj1xxoEw6K-xzXk8Q6swfslLoToXKmllVMpf2cB_LVDIZsq_pQmuaNhqIoiAjeaJYGvXiwsQQmRdGgFIEkW4E3T5dyBgGQEQRjUmp4ku8pU-5eEHAYvTQoMpTQGSO2X7_fsVtGy-A6-XTD-QJ-gXMjv5h_1nZON4uPdpOiBvcvwzmK6W7oRwBlVOLJVx1biKUOemOtBq6HHYb1H2tzgFVpMhWHvIRX4wVywDSHiKGul6v9t5pnm2NnX_ZrTv1DsInw1WDBMUiC1fJ9NaZ4H28NzBPOerfIrGPKSk79qHIq345WiBP_QkcAHhWtEdkYEE-Hc6qmdbn8iScPFAjEb0QrVPr79OU1bzXe3LfGSBkk1ZFYGxcgFgC2nK0p2rEh1B_aRC0MA4zOU3BDueGhOXVaoKPua1S4Uwmg%3D%3D)** [ **TAKE THE PLEDGE** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=49b8fc31bd7d4cf29fc412de8214c26e&_e=nSxm057EyPNyqjDibKjb5CC52KKzzA4OVpjngyNygxherXxwob3vXj1xxoEw6K-xzXk8Q6swfslLoToXKmllVMpf2cB_LVDIZsq_pQmuaNhqIoiAjeaJYGvXiwsQQmRdGgFIEkW4E3T5dyBgGQEQRjUmp4ku8pU-5eEHAYvTQoMpTQGSO2X7_fsVtGy-A6-XTD-QJ-gXMjv5h_1nZON4uPdpOiBvcvwzmK6W7oRwBlX7m09JeR1ZaG9eLdfwXPBVG7odzfFyfEt9oPRzlmrvlsEOeaz6GThFgyeDbvYxK8BwOkZPGwqNgGpSkRME-dDvOq1YHk_sal94xQkdDHSOSMa_tsQ7dUOnfyJRSNP9U30GAc87jrUGJa3ZOMZf4OPeMsxVUrViBgtueTK60IWSKlaa3J7SdxStrgYVz_TewUJIvkOVD59qZLWBCLuv1wlohy5dvwMTxQErFnlnOijgOg%3D%3D) I need to know that you’re ready to fight, Peter... because the truth is, we’re going to face an uphill battle.
The Democrats are going to play dirty. They’re going to try every trick in the book... because they have a lot to lose.
We need to be prepared to fight back, so I need to know I can count on you to DEFEND our values. [**Will you show me now by adding your name to the pledge?**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=49b8fc31bd7d4cf29fc412de8214c26e&_e=nSxm057EyPNyqjDibKjb5CC52KKzzA4OVpjngyNygxherXxwob3vXj1xxoEw6K-xzXk8Q6swfslLoToXKmllVMpf2cB_LVDIZsq_pQmuaNhqIoiAjeaJYGvXiwsQQmRdGgFIEkW4E3T5dyBgGQEQRjUmp4ku8pU-5eEHAYvTQoMpTQGSO2X7_fsVtGy-A6-XTD-QJ-gXMjv5h_1nZON4uPdpOiBvcvwzmK6W7oRwBlXEk09UZaPQ6G3wRF8Tk1Ew6aeozw7rOT18hJLVQAmMZmLbBcW_Bd11dcgs1sIEJGKZd-sncZY8GrwmVpybtzPr7rFQkN77iTPg82CC7oFrvzWLaKXvXO0muyl-TEsoY_w8-vEvPNrgwjBqsdOydiSeHKP7On5pwsM56kmrftM2ukVbOtot418rzNAebtuD6KOAX21KeWExxhJIb4Vdhu3mfbVQuvV3cgm2T5hyfxhYMQ%3D%3D)** **
**[This link is directly tied to your email address, and will expire soon... Can I count on you?

subject: Congress needs people like Monika
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
We have a great candidate running to flip the 2nd district in North Carolina

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9f2/7dfbb003/42a95132/5527c423/1870023874/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&refcode2=header")
---
Friend, 2020 is here and we need strong and effective leadership in Congress more than ever. Our President is skirting his impeachment, while putting our brave men and women in uniform at risk with his recklessness. North Carolina and our great country need real fighters in Washington to stomp out corruption and get our country back on track. Luckily, Monika is running. She has been fighting to combat sexual assault and violence in her job every day for the past 20 years. She is seasoned at taking the fight to wrongdoers. Now it is our job to make sure she is able to get there. [We are 54 days away from this tough primary and every dollar helps us talk to more voters and let them know that they have a real alternative to send to Washington. Could you pitch in $5, $10, or $20 to help us talk to voters (i.e. walking literature, advertising, yard signs)?](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9f2/7dfbb003/42a95132/5527c420/1870023874/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mjhfornc") [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9f2/7dfbb003/42a95132/5527c420/1870023874/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mjhfornc") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5»](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9f2/7dfbb003/42a95132/5527c421/1870023874/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5")

What a difference six months can make, friend! Six months ago, Tom entered the presidential race because none of the other candidates were focused on the most important issues affecting our country: addressing the climate crisis and returning the power of our democracy to all Americans. Today, every major candidate has a substantial climate plan, but Tom is still the only candidate willing to declare a national climate emergency on day one, use the powers of the presidency to take meaningful action, and make addressing this crisis the top priority of his administration. _**[To thank you for being part of this team, we’d like to send you a free “Save the World” sticker, so you can represent TeamTom everywhere you go — just tell us where to send it](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BXrh2sG7GKlnN05vhrkuivjf9RMZtdLUI4s2rEO6LBECUUts6S6oyg0AkeCvPpgiMNFtvUziLSPMOpLtBztDfrVJ9fPXAg7FMObrBFl9o9-2BTRqyb7wzB2N-2F7h9x4EW2U14u-2BuRMnUlSPs1K1MQWoZg2B2e0CeNVQPUlPuwERsFkm7mcfaqYuxAjyqMVFUSgwE8ZgBhGto5tKIP-2Fm-2BISwbHT_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdEdJkdDHkFe2YmMUV2Gi9CLjEC0eVq-2FkRkVCQyqTRGnz8EBMP3Ky8GQGuDMxqpj1KCiJpUaFyzAkpfgwH4RkV9cBaSyM3lEKgjVs6urOC3OkCdVwsneKrUXxIIycHK-2F5QV4NWeyFK78eKDWZX5kVtU71ns-2BtZeUtk-2Fk8JiWedtlTy-2Bl-2FCwjrzIq0r9gL66jpIVgdU6NFcyONhA2OP1gpA227eYTpokML96INoVbnqlMFyiNimfX2erF-2B2Lj4xBsgugyxszFDFdbKFvSrbybdEQfrCM5qwLHlIQVkiD2Y7tS88CPy4PNov3ZE3CvcKlxSdGusFmj9w9lGRdBs4ODFXAKabN4ZseD31Nn6EfUyfg9w-3D-3D).**_ Since we started, Tom has held town halls across the country — listening to Americans who feel left behind by Washington politicians funded by big corporations. He brought their message to the debate stage and to the policy room. The promise of tackling climate injustice, breaking the corporate stranglehold, and doing the right thing in the face of blatant corruption is not a light one. That is why we must keep fighting. A lot has happened in the past six months, but there’s still a lot more to do. **Let’s show the D.C. insiders that the American people stand united behind Tom and are ready to fight together for what’s right.** Together, we will create a government that is of, by, and for the people. Onward,
Tom 2020

clean_body: | | | | What a difference six months can make, friend! Six months ago, Tom entered the presidential race because none of the other candidates were focused on the most important issues affecting our country: addressing the climate crisis and returning the power of our democracy to all Americans. Today, every major candidate has a substantial climate plan, but Tom is still the only candidate willing to declare a national climate emergency on day one, use the powers of the presidency to take meaningful action, and make addressing this crisis the top priority of his administration. . Since we started, Tom has held town halls across the country — listening to Americans who feel left behind by Washington politicians funded by big corporations. He brought their message to the debate stage and to the policy room. The promise of tackling climate injustice, breaking the corporate stranglehold, and doing the right thing in the face of blatant corruption is not a light one. That is why we must keep fighting. A lot has happened in the past six months, but there’s still a lot more to do. Let’s show the D.C. insiders that the American people stand united behind Tom and are ready to fight together for what’s right. Together, we will create a government that is of, by, and for the people. Onward, Tom 2020 | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! | | Peter: The Trump administration has wasted no time in the new year deconstructing the country further. Ben Carson announced that Housing and Urban Development (HUD) was undoing Obama regulations meant to end segregation in government housing. Customs and Border Patrol held Iranian-Americans at airports, questioning their loyalties and terrifying families. Trump even blamed Obama for Iranian airstrikes. We need to know what engaged Democrats think about these developments so we can understand how likely Trump's re-election will be: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd2/6e9863e8/17b2b412/1db0475e/3137121578/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6ZfSA33G") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd2/6e9863e8/17b2b412/1db0475e/3137121578/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6ZfSA33G") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd2/6e9863e8/17b2b412/1db047a3/3137121578/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200109c.ND&refcode2=loMUdQfkWI1x7ureDuD4")

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: compare and contrast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This is a matter of integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907b9/7f51f7bc/4aea8849/4ef02b15/2489687586/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| |
Hi Peter,

We want to tell you in detail why replacing Senator John Cornyn with MJ Hegar matters so much. But if you already know the reasons and are ready to pitch in to support MJ's campaign, **[you can do that here.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907b9/7f51f7bc/4aea8849/4ef02b14/2489687586/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200109.2nd__728__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**This is a matter of integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence.

MJ has dedicated her entire life to service.**
* A combat search and rescue pilot in the Air Force, she went head to head with the Taliban in Afghanistan.
* Then, she took on the Pentagon to overturn the Ground Combat Exclusion Rule that barred women from ground combat jobs.
* **Now, she's the only political outsider in Texas' Senate race.** She's a working mom who has actually faced the struggles many Texans do, and she's not accepting a dime from corporate PACs. **[That means she needs you -- will you donate today to send MJ to the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907b9/7f51f7bc/4aea8849/4ef02b14/2489687586/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200109.2nd__728__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**Sen. Cornyn, on the other hand?**
* First, he worked his way up in the political establishment in Texas.
* Then, he spent nearly two decades in Washington selling Texans out to the special interests and his DC bosses -- like when he voted to repeal health care protections _eighteen times._
* Now, he's running for reelection with a nearly $11 million war chest heavily funded by special interests, with outside groups _already_ boosting him and spending millions on ads.

The choice couldn't be clearer: a working mom and combat veteran who has lived her values, or an entrenched establishment politician who takes his marching orders from the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. **Are you with MJ?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: This is a matter of integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence. | "" | | Hi Peter, We want to tell you in detail why replacing Senator John Cornyn with MJ Hegar matters so much. But if you already know the reasons and are ready to pitch in to support MJ's campaign, "" This is a matter of integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence. MJ has dedicated her entire life to service. A combat search and rescue pilot in the Air Force, she went head to head with the Taliban in Afghanistan. Then, she took on the Pentagon to overturn the Ground Combat Exclusion Rule that barred women from ground combat jobs. Now, she's the only political outsider in Texas' Senate race. She's a working mom who has actually faced the struggles many Texans do, and she's not accepting a dime from corporate PACs. "" Sen. Cornyn, on the other hand? First, he worked his way up in the political establishment in Texas. Then, he spent nearly two decades in Washington selling Texans out to the special interests and his DC bosses -- like when he voted to repeal health care protections eighteen times. Now, he's running for reelection with a nearly $11 million war chest heavily funded by special interests, with outside groups already boosting him and spending millions on ads. The choice couldn't be clearer: a working mom and combat veteran who has lived her values, or an entrenched establishment politician who takes his marching orders from the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. Are you with MJ? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Team MJ "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. **Here's the challenge:** Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Pete Buttigieg all raised more than our campaign last quarter, setting us a few steps behind a few weeks before caucusing and voting begins.

**But there's good news:** In 2020, we'll be disclosing our fundraising numbers on a monthly basis -- and that means our January fundraising numbers will be our last opportunity to demonstrate the strength of our grassroots movement before the Iowa caucuses and close the gap.

**So here's what we'll need to do:** Close the fundraising gap as quickly as possible and make this our strongest month yet.

**Why we're asking:** You're a valuable member of this team, and Elizabeth needs your help. The only way we're reaching our goals is through grassroots support, so any contribution you can make today would go a long, long way.

[**Will you make your first contribution to help make January the strongest fundraising month possible before the Iowa caucuses?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852baed/45c30650/1eeb26a9f/66fc89eb/2766037231/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjMyRl9FR1JfR0JOX0NfMjAyMDAxMDlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN32F_EGR_GBN_C_20200109_V1S1_P")

Kansas is officially in play for Democrats and Mitch McConnell is NERVOUS:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc34f/2a380d31/22b9b811/f0fac7/3722557091/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwMTA5X01XSDRCQjJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20200109_MWH4BB2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")
With McConnell on the defensive and Democrat Dr. Barbara Bollier in the race, The Kansas City Star says that "Kansas Democrats may have their best shot in decades to win a Senate seat."
This race won't be a cakewalk but if Barbara can keep up her momentum, we've got a real shot at flipping this seat -- and the Senate. [**We 've set a $5,000 goal for her campaign, and $3 or more would go a really long way toward getting us there and turning this seat blue. Will you please help out, everyone?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc34f/2a380d31/22b9b811/f0fac7/3722557091/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwMTA5X01XSDRCQjJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20200109_MWH4BB2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Our chance at another big victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
The time for our next "pink sneaker moment" is now
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk26-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk26-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Friend,
When I filibustered for reproductive rights in the Texas State Senate, I was the one up there in the pink sneakers. But the most extraordinary thing that happened that day didn't have anything to do with me.
Thousands of people came to the statehouse in solidarity - and it was their voices, their upset and their stomping feet that ultimately stopped the Senate from passing a disastrous anti-abortion bill. That day, we proved that when we show up as a team, we can make a difference.
**This year, we have a chance at another big victory: flipping TX-21 from red to blue and sending Chip Roy, one of the most anti-choice House members, packing.** But we've all got to show up again - just like we did on the day of the filibuster.
**That 's why I'm asking 5,000 grassroots Democrats to become founding members of my 2020 Pink Sneaker Squad. ****[Give $3 or more right now to join my 2020 Pink Sneaker Squad, and flip this House seat from red to blue!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk26-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk26-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
POLITICO is calling this race one of the biggest House battles of 2020 - and losing here could ruin our chances of expanding the Democratic majority. The time for our next "pink sneaker moment" is _now_ - **but we're only 12% of the way to our founding members goal.**
2020 is already upon us - so please, secure your membership before midnight tonight. **[Rush $3 or more to become a 2020 Pink Sneaker Squad member, and help flip TX-21 from red to blue!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk26-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thank you for showing up - back in 2013 and again today.
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361af4/704929dc/16166ac1/3993948d/1926552063/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361af4/704929dc/16166ac1/3993948f/1926552063/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361af4/704929dc/16166ac1/3993948e/1926552063/VEsO/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Dangerous Democrats
body:
As I’m writing this, Democrats are debating limiting the powers of the Commander in Chief of the United States.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-359949-841596-4813725-d591c90a01-61df8317f2)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-359949-841596-4813724-2c2513bf9f-61df8317f2) As I’m writing this, Democrats are voting to limit the powers of the Commander in Chief of the United States.

Seriously?

Less than 48 hours ago, Iran’s terrorist regime launched missiles and struck military barracks in Iraq.

And Democrats’ reaction was to propose and pass legislation that ties the hands of President Trump in the midst of conflict!

I can’t make this stuff up.

The actions of Democrats are not about national security. It’s not about projecting strength against a foreign enemy. **They are acting out of their hatred for President Trump.**

They all have to go, and it starts with ousting President Trump’s own Congresswoman, Lois Frankel.

[**Help me do that by donating now.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-359949-841596-4813724-2c2513bf9f-61df8317f2)

So get this, earlier this week an Iranian politician posted the list of properties owned by the President on Twitter and in a typical veiled way, encouraged acts of terrorism in those locations.

The crown jewel on that list is Mar-a-Lago, the Winter White House and voting residence of the Trump family.

Mar-a-Lago is in my Congressional District, Florida 21.

What did the sitting member of Congress do who represents Florida 21 and the Trump family? **Lois Frankel was tweeting about gun control.**

And Tuesday, local police and secret service were scrambled to Mar-a-Lago due to an “unspecified incident.”

What did Frankel do? **She tweeted about gender discrimination.**

**[Help me send her packing](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-359949-841596-4813724-2c2513bf9f-61df8317f2) and I’ll tell you what I would do.**

Local law enforcement are already strained with a direct threat of terrorism within their community.

They need more funds, and they need it now.

**Rather than tweeting about gun control and identity politics, I’d be hustling to produce an emergency bill to secure the lives and properties of my constituents.**

And included in that legislation would be a request to TSA to enhance security screenings of foreign arrivals.

When American lives are in the firing line, it’s the duty of every elected official to step up and stand together regardless of their political differences.

The actions of the Democrats and Lois Frankel are beyond appalling. It’s shameful and they need to drain the Swamp of their presence.

The General Election is a little under 10 months away. The time is going to fly by so [**help me kick off 2020 strong by donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-359949-841596-4813724-2c2513bf9f-61df8317f2).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

name: Trump Alert
subject: Breaking: Trump could win the Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | | | | **BREAKING:** New polls suggest President Trump could LOSE the popular vote by a wider margin than in 2016 - but still WIN the Electoral College and the presidency!
---
**How should the election be decided?**
---
| | | [Electoral College](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MTY4MTE2OTcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMDU5NTI2NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [Popular Vote](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY4MTE2OTcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMDU5NTI2NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This is a disaster, Team: A recent poll shows President Trump AHEAD of Democratic rivals in key swing states like Michigan, Pennsylvania and Wisconsin **- even though a majority of Americans disapprove of his catastrophic presidency.**
**If Trump wins in these three states, he could win the Electoral College and be reelected for four more years, even if he loses the popular vote.**
Democratic governors are fighting to make sure everyone's vote is counted equally. **But with the 2020 election just months away, we 're running out of time to make a difference. Please answer by 11:59 p.m.:**
| | **BREAKING:** New polls suggest President Trump could LOSE the popular vote by a wider margin than in 2016 - but still WIN the Electoral College and the presidency!
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Barbara Bollier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
This week, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo announced that he would not be running for the U.S. Senate in Kansas. That means that extreme conservative Kris Kobach will likely be the next nominee -- and Democrats have a better chance than ever of flipping this critical Senate seat.
Barbara Bollier is a doctor and a state senator who is running to be a voice of reason in the Senate, because Kansans and people all over the country deserve leaders who put them first. We need more people in the Senate who will do what's right, not support the extreme GOP agenda. That's why I'm supporting Barbara in this race -- and I'm asking you to join me:
**[Contribute $5 now to support Barbara Bollier and help Democrats flip the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-barbara-bollier?refcode=em200109i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
A Democratic Senate majority is within our reach, Peter. According to the Cook Political Report, "Democrats appear to have expanded the playing field enough to put Republicans' majority at risk." But we can't rest on our laurels. We have to keep working to keep states like Kansas in play so we can flip the Senate in November.
We know Republicans won't go down without a fight. That's why I'm asking for you to show your support for Barbara Bollier's Senate campaign in this make-or-break moment.
Barbara supports commonsense gun safety reform, urgent action on climate change, and expanding access to affordable health care. We need to stand together and support her campaign now and prevent the GOP from installing another extreme rubber stamp.
**[Let's flip this Senate seat in Kansas, Peter. Pitch in $5 now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-barbara-bollier?refcode=em200109i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-barbara-bollier?refcode=em200109i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4ead/42ab3cf4/6010d4a0/135d5725/2997338509/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4ead/42ab3cf4/6010d4a0/135d5726/2997338509/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: A Combat Veteran's Take on Iran's Aggression
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

As a combat veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom in Afghanistan, nothing is more important to me than the safety of our soldiers and the security of our homeland.

Combat operations should always serve as a last resort, however, when that determination is made, planning must be meticulous while action must be quick, overwhelming, and decisive.

I believe all of those criteria were clearly met when President Trump recently authorized an airstrike on Iranian military personnel, killing Qassem Soleimani.

Soleimani and the Iranian Revolutionary Guard Quds Force has long been a terrorist organization. They are directly responsible for hundreds of U.S. servicemember deaths in Iraq and intelligence reports indicate they were planning more. Iran’s goal has always been to destabilize Iraq and our allies in the Middle East. This strike eliminates one of the masterminds of those efforts.

In New York, I recently called on Senate Democrats to take action on a bill that I sponsor to divest New York's assets from Iran's energy and financial sectors. New York shouldn't be investing in a country in the business of killing American citizens and military personnel or support a fundamentalist regime committed to wiping Israel off the map.

Unfortunately, New York Democrats are following the lead of Nancy Pelosi and the America-hating squad members Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib. Rather than [condemning](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=ae4a242b89&e=9f843ba602) the legitimate use of force in killing one of the leading architects of terrorism across the Middle East, we should send an unequivocal message that Iran's disturbing past and current aggression is wholly unacceptable.

I will continue to stand up against Iran here in New York and as your next Congressman. I firmly believe that there is no greater responsibility for elected officials than protecting American citizens and troops.

God Bless,
Rob
